gt_sql: SELECT T2.PostId FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.PostId = T3.Id WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'slashnick' ORDER BY T3.AnswerCount DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT p."Id" AS PostId FROM "posts" p JOIN "users" u ON p."OwnerUserId" = u."Id" WHERE TRIM(u."DisplayName") = 'slashnick' ORDER BY p."AnswerCount" DESC LIMIT 1;
question: Which post by slashnick has the most answers count? State the post ID.
